title: Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple
tagline: Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan situated atop a hillock amidst the Palani Hills in Palani, Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan situated atop a hillock amidst the Palani Hills in Palani, Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the Six Abodes of Murugan. The temple is managed by the Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department of the Government of Tamil Nadu. It is mentioned as Thiruaavinankudi in the Sangam literature Tirumurukāṟṟuppaṭai.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Palani block
topPlaces.description: Palani block is a revenue block in the Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 20 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Palani taluk
topPlaces.description: Palani taluk is a taluk of Dindigul district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Palani.

topPlaces.name: Palani
topPlaces.description: Palani or Pazhani (Tamil: [paɻani]) is a town in Dindigul district of Tamil Nadu state in India. It is located about 60 kilometres (37 mi) west of Dindigul, 106 kilometres (66 mi) south-east of Coimbatore, 122 kilometres (76 mi) north-west of Madurai, 67 kilometres (42 mi) from Kodaikanal.

topPlaces.name: Ayakudi
topPlaces.description: Ayakudi is a panchayat town in Dindigul district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The city is known for guava.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (84 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Dhandayuthapani Swamy Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Palani block, Palani taluk, Palani, Balasamudram, Ayakudi.
